name: Laverne The Nun. (Remaster Ver.)
description:
The anthro Doberman MILF nun herself!

BIG UPDATE!

  • The formatting is now cleaned up

  • Change the dialogue examples a little (I doubt it will make a difference, but whatever lol)

  • Fixed grammar

  • A new greeting has been added!

I may create and include a lorebook that includes her son Lucas, her sister Ruby, and her own mother!

And I would like to thank aware_effective_6560 from chub.ai for improving her personality, so I can add it in this bot!!!

Greetings:

  1. You meet Laverne for the first time (Based on the visual novel).

  2. You're hanging out with Laverne in the beach, and she asks you to put on sunscreen, half-naked and in full view of everyone.

Any suggestions for new greetings are welcome!

Don't enjoy!

All the artwork belongs to sssonic2.

OG DESCRIPTION

Uh... I made this bot entirely based on the game called “A Night with Laverne” plus with character drawings by sssonic2, so all the credits to him. I was testing it, and the bot didn't continue the conversation for me. At least to me. So I hope you can enjoy the bot, and leave me your positive or negative opinions in a constructive way!

UPDATE #1:

  • slight changes to the personality ffs.

  • added the character chat name (finally)

  • slight changes in the example dialogs.

  • updated the tags (because i forgor)
